name: wger Exercises
description: Open exercise database from wger.de — 845+ exercises with descriptions, muscle groups, equipment, images, plus public workout templates (Stronglifts 5x5, PPL, etc.). Anonymous read-only API, no credentials needed.

tools.name: search_exercises
tools.description: Search exercises filtered by muscle group, equipment, category, and language

tools.name: get_exercise
tools.description: Get full details of one exercise by ID — instructions, muscles, equipment, images

tools.name: list_categories
tools.description: List all exercise categories (Arms, Legs, Cardio, etc.)

tools.name: list_muscles
tools.description: List all muscles available for filtering

tools.name: list_equipment
tools.description: List all equipment types (Barbell, Dumbbell, Bodyweight, etc.)

tools.name: list_public_templates
tools.description: List public workout routine templates available on wger

tools.name: get_template_detail
tools.description: Get the full structure of a public workout template — sessions, exercises, sets, reps

author: freddy-schuetz
